origin.note: Pad A tower base = world origin

frame: +X east, +Z south (north-up images: row 0 = north, col 0 = west), +Y up, metres

provenance.dem: USGS 3DEP via 3DEPElevation ImageServer WMS — US public domain; courtesy credit: U.S. Geological Survey
provenance.drapeA: USDA NAIP (USDA_CONUS_PRIME ImageServer WMS) — US public domain; courtesy credit: USDA FSA. Vintage at this site is pre-catch-era; nodata (open Gulf / Mexico) filled procedurally.
provenance.drapeB: Sentinel-2 L2A true-colour, scenes S2B_14RPQ_20241121_0_L2A + S2B_14RPP_20241121_0_L2A (2024-11-21, <0.01 % cloud — catch era). Contains modified Copernicus Sentinel data 2024.
